channel.title: Path on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Path on Nature Works

item.title: Multipurpose pathways
item.description:
Paths in the forest garden are useful in so many different ways. They go places. They define places. They keep plants in places.

Like all good permaculture features, paths have stacking functions, multiple uses that can be combined. http://localhost:1313/blog/multipurpose-pathways/
